quote: The universe is under no obligation to make sense to you.
through_line: Saturday doesn’t argue. Eleven scientific discoveries from 2025 that are strange enough to make you stop — not because they’re important but because they’re genuinely weird. The week has been full of questions about what we’re building and why. Today’s reading is about what reality was up to while we were busy asking.

articles.title: The 11 strangest scientific discoveries of 2025
articles.pitch: BBC Science Focus rounds up the year’s most genuinely strange findings — the discoveries that didn’t fit neatly into a narrative about progress or utility, but that made scientists and editors stop and think. Eleven items, widely varied in domain, uniformly interesting. Saturday reading.
